content: Dopo che l'aveva visto, è caduto in una enorme confusione dei pensieri, era divenuto immobile e, in breve, trasformato in pietra.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by al_ex_an_der (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:After having caught sight of her, he fell into a huge confusion of thoughts, was motionless and, in short, turned to sto
